name: prompt closed-loop step history-to-ab compares two versions when both have eval-history entries
command: mkdir -p prompts/eval-history/x && printf '{"score":0.7}\n' > prompts/eval-history/x/v1.0.0.json && printf '{"score":0.8}\n' > prompts/eval-history/x/v1.1.0.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/prompts/closed-loop-test.sh" --step history-to-ab --prompt-id x --history-dir prompts/eval-history --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'ab_eligible=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
